name: EuroKids Pre-school Ravet - Ravet

itemListElement.reviewBody:
I am Happy to say EuroKids Pre School Ravet Branch is very good.
Last two years i have seen the efforts put by Management especially Ashlesha Mam, All teachers and other staff are very co-operative and full dedication put to my Child Development.

I am happy to Say EuroKids Ravet Branch is very good and recommended for Other.

Regards, Anika's Parents,
Shital and Sachin Mahajan

We were on the lookout for a great preschool for our son, Saneesh, and we're beyond thrilled that we chose EuroKids Ravet! Without a doubt, it stands out as the best preschool in the area.
Having recently moved from Canada, we joined the school in the middle of the academic year. Despite the timing, the transition was smooth, and it has truly been a pleasure to see how quickly Saneesh adjusted and thrived in such a nurturing environment.

The teachers and staff, or as they lovingly call them, *Maushis*, are incredibly supportive and caring. They've created a warm, welcoming atmosphere that makes children feel safe and excited about learning every day.

A special mention must go to ASHLESHA  Ma'am, whose dedication to each child is truly exceptional. She goes above and beyond to ensure every child feels comfortable, secure, and happy. PRASHANT Sir is also a wonderful presence at the school—kind, approachable, and always ready to assist with a smile.
The curriculum at EuroKids Ravet is outstanding.

I strongly recommend EuroKids Ravet to all parents in Ravet and surrounding areas. It's the perfect foundation for your child's early learning journey, and we feel incredibly lucky to be part of this wonderful community!

Thank you very much to the ‘Euro School ‘Ravet.

I would like to appreciate Euro Kids Ravet pre-school teachers and management. It is truly wonderful to see how the school fosters a love of learning in young children while emphasising creativity, curiosity, and emotional well-being. My son - Daivik is with Euro Kids since 2 years and we see lot changes in him. Appreciate their  efforts to create engaging and age-appropriate activities have contributed significantly to my son’s social and intellectual development. My son comes home excited to share what he has learned, which is a testament to the engaging and supportive environment.
Thank you for prioritising the happiness and growth of every child. We feel incredibly fortunate to be part of Euro Kids.

We've witnessed incredible growth in our daughter since she joined Nursery class at Euro Kids Ravet. The teachers have fostered her curiosity, encouraged her independence, and helped her develop important social skills. We were extremely proud of her during the recent sports event. It was a fantastic experience for her! We are so thankful for the positive and nurturing environment they have created.

"Euro Kids pre-school Ravet is an excellent choice for young children. The environment is safe, clean, and very child-friendly. The teachers are supportive and experienced, ensuring a strong focus on both academics and overall development.

Along with academics, the school offers engaging activities that help boost children's confidence and encourage them to learn new things. The school management is highly organized, and the communication with parents is consistent and effective.

My experience has been wonderful, and I highly recommend this school to all parents looking for a safe, nurturing, and inspiring environment for their children."

The 2024 Health is Wealth Day was, as always, fantastic! The meticulous planning was evident in the smooth flow of the day. It was fantastic to see the children so enthusiastically participate in the sports activities.

However, one particularly touching moment for me was witnessing my child helping a classmate on the ground during their class performance. This observation underscored the school's commitment to not only academic excellence but also the development of crucial life skills like humility, kindness, and empathy amongst the students.

A big thank you to Ashlesha Mam, Sir, and all the dedicated teachers and Maushi's for their tireless efforts in planning and executing such a successful Sports Day. Congratulations to the entire team!

Eurokids Ravet 1 is one of the finest preschools. Outstanding Quality Curriculum, Play Way Methodology &  Lively ambience. It's a beautiful and very hygenic campus for kids with a very nice principal Aashlesha Ma'am and well experienced teachers together making it an amazing preschool.
Good cultural vaules are taught. They encourage children to learn through hands-on activities, games, and exploration which helps in the child's overall development. My daughter Vihaana Kotian loves & enjoys her time in school.

I would personally recommend it to every parent who wishes to see their child in Safe & Inclusive Environment. Kudos to EUROKIDS RAVET 1 Branch !!

We had sports day celebration in our school yesterday it was so well organised and so minutely everybody was involved .Our kids performed so well , hats off to all the staff and teachers for the experience thoroughly enjoyed.

It's was a wonderful evening in" Health Is Wealth Day "of Euro kids Ravet-1, to have a short glimpse of becoming participants to Winners of our Lil chiks was an emotional moment for all of us .All thanks to Ashlesha Ma'am and her entire team members for their immense  hard work .Thank u so much for proving us correct in our choice of Euro Kids.

Apart from all these keeping concern for not only my child but for all ,if possible from next year's onwards can u start this event little early as sports days is always conducted in winters so it would be great if it will start in the early afternoon.

After completing my son Keshav’s preschooling up to Jr. KG in our hometown at a simple Taluka-level school, we decided to move to Pune and came across EuroKids. During the admission process, we met Ashlesha Ma’am, whose reassuring guidance made us confident in choosing the school.

We were initially concerned about how Keshav would adjust to the new environment a big leap from a small-town setting to a city school with English-speaking teachers, something unfamiliar to him. However, the school embraced him seamlessly, making the transition smooth and comfortable for him.

Initially, we noticed Keshav struggling to keep up with the other kids. Ashlesha Ma’am raised this concern with us early on, instead of pretending everything was fine. This honest communication allowed us to take the right steps to support him. Within 2–3 months, we saw a remarkable improvement. Keshav not only aligned with his peers but started thriving in this new environment.

EuroKids has been exceptional in taking care of children. They are attentive to every detail, from knowing if a child has allergies to checking for any scars or wounds during entry. Their personalized attention and proactive approach truly impressed us. We were overwhelmed with joy to see positive changes in Keshav, and we couldn’t be happier with our decision.

The school excels in organizing events like festivals and Sports Day, all conducted with enthusiasm and excellence. These celebrations have been a delightful experience for us as parents.

I wholeheartedly recommend EuroKids as one of the best places for early education. Their dedication, care, and professionalism are unmatched, and you will never regret choosing them for your child’s foundation. They are simply amazing, and I wish EuroKids continued success and growth in the future, spreading happiness to more families and nurturing young minds with love and care.
